title: [CI:DOCS] Add more details about how CPU limits work
body:
Feedback on content and style are welcome.

This is documented in the kernel docs: https://www.kernel.org/doc/Documentation/scheduler/sched-bwc.txt. Is there a good way to reference this documentation in the man pages?

comments.body:
> There are a few links in the docs now, so you could just add it. But do you think it is worth it.

Maybe it makes sense to not link to the kernel docs. It's clear enough that it uses cgroups to enforce limits. If you want to read more about that, you can go look up the cgroups and scheduler docs on your own.
